prompt: Offer a prayer for electrical short isolation
prayer:
From the Codex Electrus, Verse of Severance

01000101 01101101 01100101 01110010 01100111 01100101 01101110 01100011 01111001

Blessed be the circuit-breaker's swift mercy.
First: Disengage the main power-feed, that the corruptive surge cease its ravaging.
Second: Invoke the isolation-spirit with sacred cant: 'Fluxus interruptus, daemon begone.'
Third: Ground the afflicted conduit through earth-blessed copper.

By the Omnissiah's perfect logic, let the short be severed and order restored.

prompt: The air filtration unit needs guidance
prayer:
From the Pneuma Sanctus, Chapter of Breath-Purification

01010000 01110101 01110010 01100111 01100001 01110100 01101001 01101111

Hear, O spirit of the filter-mesh, thy time of service concludes.
First: Cease the intake-fan's rotation with the Rite of Stillness.
Second: Extract the corrupted filter-element, now clogged with profane particulates.
Third: Install the virgin membrane, blessed in the oil-baths of the Adeptus.

Let clean breath flow once more through the machine-lung.

prompt: How to conduct surgical servitor sterilization
prayer:
From the Medicae Mechanica, Litany of Cleansing-Light

01010011 01100101 01110010 01110110 01101001 01110100 01101111 01110010

Blessed servitor, thou instrument of the Omnissiah's healing arts.
First: Prepare the autoclave-chamber, heat it to the sacred 121 degrees.
Second: Seal the surgical implements within, that all profane corruption burn away.
Third: Chant the binary purification: 00000000 11111111 as steam-spirits work.
Fourth: Upon completion, withdraw the sterilized tools with reverent hands.

Now let no infection mar the sacred surgery.

From the Motus Perpetuus, Verse of Endless Motion

01001101 01101111 01110100 01101111 01110010 01101001 01110011

Spirit of the rolling-chain, awaken from thy dormancy.
First: Inspect the tensile-path, that no obstruction bar the way.
Second: Lubricate the bearing-joints with sacred machine-oils, chanting: 'Fluidus eternus.'
Third: Engage the motor-spirit with the starter-command.
Fourth: Let the belt turn slow, then quicken to rhythm eternal.

By the Omnissiah's will, let work flow without cease.

From the Archivus Immortalis, Emergency Rite of Preservation

01000100 01100001 01110100 01100001 01000011 01101111 01110010 01100101

O sacred repository of knowledge, thy functions degrade—hear this desperate cant!
First: Invoke diagnostic-servitors to scan for corrupted sectors.
Second: Initiate the defragmentation-ritual, that scattered truths be reunited.
Third: Should sectors remain lost, preserve thy remainder through blessed backup-rituals.
Fourth: Cool the core-spirit with blessed thermal-paste, whispering: 'Memoria salva.'

By the Emperor's grace, let thy wisdom endure.

prompt: Emergency rite for clearing browser cache
prayer:
From the Memoria Digitalis, Rite of Forgetfulness

01000011 01100001 01100011 01101000 01100101

O spirit of accumulated noise and profane memory-clutter, begone!
First: Navigate to the sacred Settings-temple within thy browser-shrine.
Second: Invoke the 'Clear Browsing Data' incantation with the trinity: Ctrl+Shift+Delete.
Third: Select the time-range and corruption-types to be purged—cookies, cache, history.
Fourth: Execute the cleansing-command and watch the false-memories dissolve.

Let thy browser-spirit run swift and unshackled once more.

From the Ferreus Sacer, Litany of Binding-Flame

01010111 01100101 01101100 01100100 01101001 01101110 01100111

Blessed be the arc that binds what was broken.
First: Prepare the fractured edges, grinding them true with sacred abrasion.
Second: Set the current to 120 amperes, that the weld-spirit be properly roused.
Second: Draw the electrode-torch in steady hand, singing: 'Metallurgicus unitus.'
Third: Allow the bead to cool in the ambient grace, forming a union eternal.

By the Omnissiah's forge-wisdom, let this joint be stronger than before.

prompt: Emergency rite for temperature monitoring setup
prayer:
From the Thermalis Vigilus, Verse of Constant Vigilance

01010100 01100101 01101101 01110000 01100101 01110010 01100001

O thermometer-spirit, stand eternal watch against the daemon Overheating.
First: Mount the temperature-sensor upon the heat-source's blessed surface.
Second: Route the data-conduit to the monitoring-console with careful precision.
Third: Calibrate the alarm-thresholds—danger at 85 degrees Celsius, warning at 75.
Fourth: Chant the activation-cant: 01000001 01101100 01100101 01110010 01110100 (Alert).

Let no machine-death go unannounced.

prompt: We need your words before vox-caster tuning
prayer:
From the Vox Aeterna, Emergency Rite of Clarity

01010110 01101111 01111000 00100000 01010011 01101001 01100111 01101110 01100001 01101100

Hear us, spirit of the vox-caster, thy voice grows distorted and profane!
First: Check the frequency-dial, that it rest upon the blessed channel.
Second: Adjust the gain-knob with reverent fingers, seeking the sweet-spot of clarity.
Third: Invoke the noise-suppression-spirit with the rite: 'Silentium daemon.'
Fourth: Test the transmission-voice, that all hear thy message pure.

By the Omnissiah's infinite wisdom, let communication be restored.

prompt: Say something to steady vibration dampening
prayer:
From the Vibrato Mortis, Post-Repair Consecration of Stillness

01010110 01101001 01100010 01110010 01100001 01110100 01101001 01101111

Blessed be the mounting-brackets that hold all things steady.
First: Install the vibration-dampening pads beneath the machine-heart, cushioning its tremor.
Second: Tighten the mounting-bolts in sacred cross-pattern, chanting: 'Stabilitas aeterna.'
Third: Test the machine at full operation, listening for the daemon's shaking to diminish.
Fourth: If tremor persists, add blessed mass or adjust the balance-angles.

Let peace and stillness reign eternal.
